titleStmt.title: SII 5.978: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 978. (A.R. No. 114 of 1896). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅka ḷertaru tan ṟoṅkal veṇku
ṭaikkīḻ nilamaka ṇilava malarmakaṭ puṇarn tu ceṅko
loccik karuṅkali kaṭin tu tan ciṟiyatātaiyaiyum tirut
tamaiyaṉaiyum kuṟikoḷ tan ṉiḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum
neṟiyuṇar tan ṟirupputalvartammaiyun tunṟeḻil
vānavan vallavan mīnavan kaṅkan Ilaṅkayaṟkiṟaiva
n pulaṅkeḻaṟ pallavan kanṉakucciyar kāvalanenap
ponnaṇi cuṭarmaṇimakuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭarpukaḻ pāṅkava
rkkavar nāṭaruḷip pāṅkuṟa mannu pala lūḻiyuḷ tennavan mu
varuḷ mānāparaṇan ponamuṭiyānāpa parumatiḷ pacun=ta lai poruka
ḷat tarintu vāraḷaviya kaḻal virakeraḷaṉai muṉaivayiṟ piṭittut tanattivāraṇa
k katakkaṭakkaḷiṟṟā lutaippittaruḷi An=ta mil perumpukaḻc cun=ta rapāṇṭi
yan Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyum kaṟṟai veṇ kavariyuñ ciṅkācanamum veṅkaḷa
t tiḻan tu tan muṭi viḻat talaivirit taṭitaḷar n=to ṭat tollaiyil mullaiyūr
t turatti yolkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupuka ḻirāmakuṭa muvar ke
ṭa munin tu miṭalkeḻu villavan kuṭarmaṭik koṇṭu tan nāṭu viṭṭoṭik kāṭupukkoḷippa vañci
yam potumalar malain=tā ṅ keñcalil vilaikeḻu kān=ta ḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppit tāhavamal
lanuma Añcaṟ kevutan ṟāṅkarum paṭaiyā lāṅkavan ceṉaiyuṭ kaṇṭappayaṉuṅ kaṅkātiranu maṇṭa
mar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritara vikkiyum vicaiyātittanum karumuraṭcāṅkamayanu mutalinar [sa]
marabhī ruvottuṭai nimircuṭarp ponno ṭayṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭittut tannāṭaiyiṟ jayaṅkoṇṭu
tunnaār koḷḷippākkaiyuḷ ḷerimaṭuppit torutanit taṇṭāṟ porukaṭa lilaṅkayar komakan vikkirama
pāhu vin makuṭamum munṟanak kuṭain tu tenṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatu miḻan tu Eḻkaṭalīḻampuk kilaṅkecanākiya
vikkiramapāṇṭiyan parumaṇimakuṭamuṅ kāṇṭaku tannatākiya tan kannakucciyilum Ārkali yīḻañ ciriten
ṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷnāṭu tan nuṟavoṭum pukun tu viḷaṅku muṭikavitta vīracalāmekan porkkaḷattañci
t tankāṟkaḷi ṟiḻin tu kavvaiyuṟ ṟoṭik kātaliyoṭu tanṟavvaiyaip piṭittut tāyai mukkariya Ā
ṅkavamānam nīṅkutaṟkāka mīṭṭuvan tu vāṭṭoḻi luḻan tu veṅkaḷat tulan=ta vacciṅkaḷattaraican ponna
ṇimuṭiyuṅ kannaran vaḻivan turaiko ḷīḻattaraicanākiya cīrvallavan matanarājan Elloḷittaṭar ma
ṇimuṭiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapulat tirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭartinakaran nāraṇan kaṇavati
vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtanaren ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai muṉaivayiṟ ṟuratti vampalar tarupoḻil
kampilinakaruṭ caḷukkiyar māḷikai takarppit tiḷakkamil villavar mīnavar veḻkulac caḷukkiyar va
llavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cin turar Aiyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An tarar mutaliyar Araica
riṭutiṟaikaḷum Āṟilon ṟavaniyiṟ kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukan tu nānmaṟaiyavā muka
n tu] koḷak kuṭuttu viśva lokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi ninṟu Aśva metañ ceytaraicu vīṟ
ṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻan Uyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirājakesa rivanma rāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhi rā
jade varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatu ḷ 100 5 10 1- ṉāl kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻapurattu nam vīṭṭinuḷḷāl
kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻanmāḷikaiyil vaṭakkiṟ copānattu Eḻun=ta ruḷi Irun tu rājendra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu tiru
vintaḷūrnāṭṭu Aḻakiyacoḻanallūr veḷḷānvakaiyil mutal yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatumutal tavirn tu Ivvūr Aḷan=ta paṭi
nilam 10 9 Ika� māvaālum Ūrirukkaiyālum Ūruṇi
kuḷattālum piṭārikoyilālum niṅku nilam I � nīkki nilam 10 6vama
� māvināl niccayittu Iṟaikaṭṭinapaṭi tavirttana varicaikki
ḻ vanta ḷa� m Innāṭṭu nāṅkūrnāṭṭu nāṅkūr tiruveṇkāṭu Uṭai
yār koyilil tuppayan Uttamacoḻi Eḻun=ta ruḷuvitta Arttanā ride varkku veṇṭum nivan
taṅkaḷukku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatumutal Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum niṟṟiṟaiyāy Iṟupapatāka tevatā
namāka variyiliṭṭuk kuṭuttatu .
Digital edition of SII 5.978 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
